purpose: Intelligent Receipt OCR Platform that transforms receipt photos into structured, searchable data using dual OCR engines and a multi-agent AI pipeline with real-time streaming

actors.name: End User
actors.description: Uploads receipt images, views OCR results, triggers AI enhancement, and organizes receipts in folders

external_systems.name: Google Cloud Vision API
external_systems.description: Cloud-based OCR with DOCUMENT_TEXT_DETECTION for high-accuracy text extraction

external_systems.name: OpenAI API
external_systems.description: Powers the 3-stage AI receipt parsing pipeline (Organizer, Auditor, Stylist agents)

containers.name: ScanServe SPA
containers.technology: React 18, TypeScript 5, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
containers.description: Modern web frontend with offline-first storage, real-time AI streaming UI, and responsive design

containers.name: ScanServe API
containers.description: Backend API handling OCR processing, AI pipeline orchestration, file storage, and receipt management

containers.name: IndexedDB
containers.description: Client-side persistence for receipts, folders, and settings with offline support

containers.name: File Storage
containers.description: Server-side storage for uploaded images, OCR results, AI trace logs, and JSON database

backend.name: OCR Router
backend.description: FastAPI endpoints for OCR processing, AI parsing (sync + streaming), and HTML ticket rendering

backend.name: Receipts Router
backend.description: CRUD endpoints for receipt management with queued OCR support

backend.name: Folders Router
backend.description: Folder hierarchy management for receipt organization

backend.name: Notifications Router
backend.description: Email notification triggers for batch processing completion

backend.name: EasyOCR Service
backend.description: Local OCR using EasyOCR with field extraction heuristics (merchant, date, total)

backend.name: Google Vision OCR Service
backend.description: Cloud OCR integration with retry logic and line grouping algorithm

backend.name: AI Receipt Pipeline
backend.description: 3-stage LLM orchestration: Organizer → Auditor → Stylist with JSON validation and streaming

backend.name: AI Trace Service
backend.description: Observability layer storing run history, revisions, and Markdown snapshots

backend.name: OCR Queue
backend.description: Thread-based concurrent job queue for batch OCR processing

backend.name: Storage Service
backend.description: File upload handling and static file management

frontend.name: Receipts Feature Module
frontend.description: Self-contained feature with IndexedDB repos, TanStack Query hooks, and UI components

frontend.name: OCR Store
frontend.description: Zustand store for OCR state, AI pipeline progress, and bounding box interactions

frontend.name: API Service
frontend.description: Axios REST client + native fetch NDJSON stream consumer

main_flows.name: AI Receipt Parsing (Streaming)
main_flows.description: User triggers AI enhancement → Backend orchestrates 3-agent pipeline → NDJSON events stream to UI in real-time
steps: User clicks 'Enhance with AI' on OCR result
Frontend POSTs to /ocr/ai/parse/stream with text_raw and boxes
Backend creates AI trace run for observability
Organizer agent normalizes text with Icelandic context
Handoff event sent, Auditor agent validates fields
Handoff event sent, Stylist agent generates clean Markdown
Each stage emits stage_start, stage_result, notes, stage_end events
Final result event with structured receipt data
Frontend updates UI progressively via ocrStore

main_flows.name: Batch OCR Processing
main_flows.description: Multi-file upload with queued processing and optional email notifications
steps: Backend queues OCR jobs in thread pool
On completion, optional email notification sent

deployment_nodes.name: Render
deployment_nodes.description: Backend deployment with auto-detection via RENDER env var, binds to 0.0.0.0:PORT

deployment_nodes.name: Netlify / Vercel
deployment_nodes.description: Frontend SPA deployment with global CDN distribution (supuesto)

deployment_nodes.name: Local Development
deployment_nodes.description: Vite dev server (8080) + Uvicorn with hot reload (8000)
